rules.title: Cross Site Scripting Strings
rules.condition_summary: select_method and keywords excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: Detects XSS attempts injected via GET requests in access logs

rules.title: Flash Player Update from Suspicious Location
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: Detects a flashplayer update from an unofficial location

rules.title: Suspicious Browser Child Process - MacOS
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_* excluding 1 of filter_optional_*
rules.description: Detects suspicious child processes spawned from browsers. This could be a result of a potential web browser exploitation.
